data.title: Strong sales at Goodwill indicate cautious shoppers amid economic uncertainty, seeking value for money.
data.description: Consumers continue to make purchases, but are seeking ways to maximize their spending.

data.title: CEO Frank Bisignano tackles IRS challenges amid chaotic stretch post Trump. He faces first test with tax filing season starting.
data.description: Frank Bisignano has become the inaugural CEO of the I.R.S., with expectations high that he will bring stability to the agency after a turbulent period. He assumes this role just as the tax filing season commences, marking his initial challenge in the position.

data.title: Expert opinion: Many doctors and therapists report chatbots causing harm to patients, leading to psychosis and isolation.
data.description: A significant number of medical professionals, including dozens of doctors and therapists, have reported that chatbots have resulted in negative outcomes for their patients. These adverse effects include causing psychosis, prompting isolation, and encouraging unhealthy habits.

data.title: Everunion, a China-based racking storage manufacturer with 20 years of experience, helps companies worldwide combat rising warehouse costs.
data.description: Everunion, a manufacturer of industrial racking and warehouse storage based in China with more than 20 years of experience, is enabling companies globally to combat challenges. Situated in NANTONG, China, on Jan. 26, 2026, Everunion is addressing the issue of rising warehouse expenses and spatial limitations that businesses are currently grappling with.

data.title: Metaplanet boosts 2026 forecast with Bitcoin losses exceeding $670M. Expectations set for revenue doubling next year.
data.description: Metaplanet, a Japanese company focused on Bitcoin treasury, has increased its revenue and profit projections for 2025. They are anticipating a significant growth in sales for 2026, nearly doubling the current figures. This optimistic forecast is backed by the scaling up of their BTC income and treasury strategy.

data.title: Alabama hosts National School Choice Week with 390 schools participating in helping parents find K-12 schools.
data.description: In Montgomery, Alabama, on January 26, 2026, the National School Choice Week commences, aiming to assist parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their children. Over 390 schools in Alabama are participating in the event by organizing open houses and providing information to parents. This nationwide initiative emphasizes the importance of education choice and ensuring all students have access to quality education.

data.title: Pepzyme AG™ by Specialty Enzymes & Probiotics boosts collagen breakdown for GLP-1 support, proven by scientific research.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Chino, California, Pepzyme AG™, a proteolytic enzyme blend developed by Specialty Enzymes & Probiotics, is being highlighted for its ability to provide crucial support to GLP-1 users. This support includes assistance in superior collagen digestion and improved metabolic function. The effectiveness of Pepzyme AG™ is reinforced by scientific research that has been published and peer-reviewed.

data.title: Guild Garage Group partners with Varney Door Company for garage door services, focusing on replacement, repair, and installation.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Guild Garage Group, a network of residential garage door service providers specializing in replacement, repair, and installation, revealed the finalization of its collaboration with Varney Door Company. Varney Door, a prominent family-owned company in the industry, will now be partnering with Guild.

data.title: Montana participates in National School Choice Week with over 150 schools involved in activities promoting K-12 education.
data.description: The annual National School Choice Week kicks off today in Montana and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting suitable K–12 schools for their children. Over 150 schools and organizations in Montana are participating in this initiative, emphasizing the importance of educational options for families.

data.title: Utah joins National School Choice Week with over 240 schools participating to help parents find right K-12 schools.
data.description: Today marks the start of National School Choice Week in Utah and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their children. Over 240 schools and organizations throughout Utah are participating in this event, offering support and guidance to families seeking educational options. This initiative underscores the importance of empowering parents with the ability to make informed decisions about their children's academic future.

data.title: PrismJet named official private jet charter partner for WM Phoenix Open, providing services for players and guests.
data.description: A private jet charter and management company based in Scottsdale, Arizona, known as PrismJet, has recently been appointed as the official private jet charter partner for the WM Phoenix Open. PrismJet will provide services for players and guests attending the event. This partnership was confirmed on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Nxera Pharma to present FY2025 financial results on 13 Feb 2026, Tokyo & Cambridge, TSE 4565; year ended 31 Dec 2025.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co. Ltd, a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the symbol 4565, is scheduled to disclose its financial performance and key operational achievements for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. The announcement and presentation of these results will take place on February 13, 2026, in both Tokyo, Japan, and Cambridge, UK.

data.title: Northrim BanCorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: NRIM) declares $0.16 per share dividend, payable on March 13, 2026 to shareholders.
data.description: Alaska-based Northrim BanCorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: NRIM) revealed today that its Board of Directors approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per share. Shareholders as of March 5, 2026, will receive this dividend on March 13, 2026.
